接口 IOpenSet

所有已知实现类:
BinaryHeapOpenSet
public interface IOpenSet
An open set for A* or similar graph search algorithm

  • 方法概要

    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    void
    insert(PathNode node)
    Inserts the specified node into the heap
    boolean
    isEmpty()
     
    PathNode
    removeLowest()
    Removes and returns the minimum element in the heap.
    void
    update(PathNode node)
    A faster path has been found to this node, decreasing its cost.

  • 方法详细资料

    • insert

      void insert(PathNode node)
      Inserts the specified node into the heap
      参数:
      node - The node

    • isEmpty

      boolean isEmpty()
      返回:
      true if the heap has no elements; false otherwise.

    • removeLowest

      PathNode removeLowest()
      Removes and returns the minimum element in the heap.
      返回:
      The minimum element in the heap

    • update

      void update(PathNode node)
      A faster path has been found to this node, decreasing its cost. Perform a decrease-key operation.
      参数:
      node - The node
